allow: PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -lc "ros2 pkg list | grep ur_simulation")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -lc "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && ros2 pkg list | grep ur_simulation")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -lc "ps aux | grep -E 'ros2|rviz|gazebo|gzserver|gzclient' | grep -v grep")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -lc "echo DISPLAY=$DISPLAY && vncserver -list 2>/dev/null || true")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -lc "pkill -f 'ros2 launch' || true; pkill -f gzserver || true; pkill -f rviz2 || true; sleep 1; echo 'Cleaned up'")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "pkill -f 'ros2 launch' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f gzserver 2>/dev/null; pkill -f rviz2 2>/dev/null; echo done")

PowerShell(docker exec -d rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "export DISPLAY=:1 && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 launch rdkdc_setup ur5e_sim.launch.py ur_type:=ur5e launch_rviz:=true gazebo_gui:=false > /tmp/rdkdc_launch.log 2>&1")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "cat /tmp/rdkdc_launch.log 2>/dev/null | head -40")

PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && timeout 60 bash -c 'until ros2 node list 2>/dev/null | grep -q controller_manager; do sleep 2; done; echo ready'")

PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 node list && echo '---' && ros2 control list_controllers 2>/dev/null || echo 'controllers not listed yet'")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 control list_controllers")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 control list_controllers")

PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 topic echo /joint_states --once 2>/dev/null | head -20")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "ps aux | grep -E 'rviz2|scaled_joint' | grep -v grep")

PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 service list | grep controller_manager | head -10")

PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 service call /controller_manager/list_controllers controller_manager_msgs/srv/ListControllers '{}' 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'name|state'")

PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 service call /controller_manager/configure_controller controller_manager_msgs/srv/ConfigureController '{name: scaled_joint_trajectory_controller}'")

PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && ros2 service call /controller_manager/switch_controller controller_manager_msgs/srv/SwitchController '{activate_controllers: [scaled_joint_trajectory_controller], deactivate_controllers: [], strictness: 2, activate_asap: true, timeout: {sec: 10, nanosec: 0}}'")

PowerShell(docker exec -d rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "export DISPLAY=:1 && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash && export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0 && rviz2 -d /root/ros2_ws/install/rdkdc_setup/share/rdkdc_setup/rviz/ur_frames.rviz > /tmp/rviz2.log 2>&1")
PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "ps aux | grep rviz2 | grep -v grep | head -3")
PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/health" -UseBasicParsing)
PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/joint_states" -UseBasicParsing)

PowerShell($candidates = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\MATLAB" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Name -Descending | ForEach-Object { Join-Path $_.FullName "bin\\matlab.exe" }; $matlab = $candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($matlab\) { $matlab } else { "MATLAB not found" })

PowerShell($testScript = "d:\\ros2_jazzy_vnc\\ros2_jazzy_vnc\\test.m"; $matlabDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE "ros2_ws\\matlab"; & "C:\\Program Files\\MATLAB\\R2024b\\bin\\matlab.exe" -batch "setenv\('RDKDC_BRIDGE_URL','http://127.0.0.1:8765'\); addpath\('$\($matlabDir.Replace\('\\','/'\)\)'\); run\('$\($testScript.Replace\('\\','/'\)\)'\)")

PowerShell(docker exec rdkdc_ros2_jazzy bash -c "grep -q 'rdkdc_setup' /root/.bashrc || printf '\\n# RDKDC workspace\\nsource /root/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash\\nexport DISPLAY=:1\\n' >> /root/.bashrc && echo 'Profile updated' && tail -5 /root/.bashrc")
